subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou hast adorned the heaven of inner meanings with the stars of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی زینت به سماء المعانی بکواکب البیان و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
